# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: se-thirdparty-apis
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  exportTo:
  - "*"
  hosts:
  - api.stripe.com
  - api.twilio.com
  - api.sendgrid.com
  - api.github.com
  - api.openai.com
  - maps.googleapis.com
  - www.googleapis.com
  - oauth2.googleapis.com
  - sts.googleapis.com
  - storage.googleapis.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  ports:
  - name: https
    number: 443
    protocol: TLS
  - name: http
    number: 80
    protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-thirdparty-apis-egress
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  exportTo:
  - "*"
  hosts:
  - api.stripe.com
  - api.twilio.com
  - api.sendgrid.com
  - api.github.com
  - api.openai.com
  - maps.googleapis.com
  - www.googleapis.com
  - oauth2.googleapis.com
  - sts.googleapis.com
  - storage.googleapis.com
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.stripe.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.stripe.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.twilio.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.twilio.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.sendgrid.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.sendgrid.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.github.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.github.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.openai.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.openai.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - maps.googleapis.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: maps.googleapis.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - www.googleapis.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: www.googleapis.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - oauth2.googleapis.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: oauth2.googleapis.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - sts.googleapis.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: sts.googleapis.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - storage.googleapis.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: storage.googleapis.com
        port:
          number: 443
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 80
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.stripe.com
        port:
          number: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: se-external-databases
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  exportTo:
  - "*"
  hosts:
  - prod-postgres.company-db.example.com
  - prod-mysql.company-db.example.com
  - prod-mongo.company-db.example.com
  - prod-redis.company-cache.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  ports:
  - name: postgres
    number: 5432
    protocol: TCP
  - name: mysql
    number: 3306
    protocol: TCP
  - name: mongodb
    number: 27017
    protocol: TCP
  - name: redis
    number: 6379
    protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-external-databases-egress
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  exportTo:
  - "*"
  hosts:
  - prod-postgres.company-db.example.com
  - prod-mysql.company-db.example.com
  - prod-mongo.company-db.example.com
  - prod-redis.company-cache.example.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: prod-postgres.company-db.example.com
        port:
          number: 5432
  - match:
    - port: 3306
    route:
    - destination:
        host: prod-mysql.company-db.example.com
        port:
          number: 3306
  - match:
    - port: 27017
    route:
    - destination:
        host: prod-mongo.company-db.example.com
        port:
          number: 27017
  - match:
    - port: 6379
    route:
    - destination:
        host: prod-redis.company-cache.example.com
        port:
          number: 6379
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: se-aws-managed-services
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  exportTo:
  - "*"
  hosts:
  - sts.amazonaws.com
  - kms.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  - s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  - secretsmanager.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  ports:
  - name: https
    number: 443
    protocol: TLS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: vs-aws-managed-services-egress
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  exportTo:
  - "*"
  hosts:
  - sts.amazonaws.com
  - kms.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  - s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  - secretsmanager.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - sts.amazonaws.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: sts.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - kms.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: kms.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 443
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - secretsmanager.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: secretsmanager.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 443
